confidenceReason: The conflicting records cannot support a judgment either way.

missingEvidence.description: The recovery calendar names the platform team while the incident playbook names a former individual owner; neither record postdates the reorg.
missingEvidence.impact: Current ownership and drill recency cannot be verified until the records are reconciled.
